case_title: MARIO R. BELOCURA VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELOCURA, MARIO R. AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIO R. BELOCURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARIO R. BELOCURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AMANDA ABRAHAMSON, RELOCATION SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
